title: ImageSource
description: Metadata for one input image. Raw pixels are never stored in the system of record; only anonymized derivatives may be referenced. There is intentionally no raw-image URI field.

external_ref.description: Provider reference (e.g. Street View pano id or fixture key). Never an image payload.

anonymized.description: True only after the irreversible face/plate anonymization gate has completed.

anonymized_uri.description: Location of the anonymized derivative image. Raw image URIs are forbidden.
